name: Jello Pudding Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Package Vanilla Pudding Mix (cooking type)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pudding according to package directions, substituting water for milk.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat and then turn off the stove.
3. Add dry Jello to the cooked pudding and stir until dissolved.
4. Refrigerate the mixture overnight.
5. Beat the set mixture until smooth.
6. Add 8 ounces Cool Whip and mix until well blended.
7. Fold in fresh fruit (the more, the better), such as strawberries, raspberries, blackberries, and peaches.
